'''Lina Mardec''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]]. She lived in [[Jalor City]] with her husband [[Riic Mardec|Riic]], a cab driver, and two daughters, [[Sale Mardec|Sale]] and [[Fora Mardec|Fora]].<ref name="AIR" />

Unfortunately, on [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], the Mardecs—except for Riic—[[Death/Legends|died]] in a crossfire when the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] attacked a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] cell. The "collateral damage" could have happened due to Rebel or Imperial fire.<ref name="AIR" />
